a.xlink:title: Give several random weapons and ammo to the entity.
Returns a random classname of the instagib item.
Returns a random classname of the item with specific property.
Returns a random classname of the vanilla item.
Returns a random classname of the overkill item.
Finds the team that will make the game most balanced if the player joins it.
Called when a client spawns in the server.
putting a client as observer in the server
Kills player as a result of team change.

Sets the team of the player with all sanity checks.
Moves player to the specified team.
Assigns the given player to a team that will make the game most balanced.
Switches a bot from one team to another if teams are not balanced.
Join an existing minigame session.
Create a new minigame session.
Called when the player connects or when they change their color with the "color" command.

Replaces a map item.
